languages.text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны солдаты охраны гробницы, исчезли из всех записей, но оставались героями, о которых не говорят. Они выковали крепкую связь с Ордо Ксенос и обеспечили Лорд-капитану новый пласт совместной работы с Инквизицией. Поддержка агентов Трона помогла сократить потери и отбить натиск Свежевателей, а некоторые отслужившие в Безымянных вербовались для службы в Инквизиции.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayed Ones, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.
languages.original_text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны солдаты охраны гробницы, исчезли из всех записей, но оставались героями, о которых не говорят. Они выковали крепкую связь с Ордо Ксенос и обеспечили Лорд-капитану новый пласт совместной работы с Инквизицией. Поддержка агентов Трона помогла сократить потери и отбить натиск Свежевателей, а некоторые отслужившие в Безымянных вербовались для службы в Инквизиции.

traits.locale_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayers, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayers, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayers, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

languages.text: 無名最後の連隊は、墓守兵として知られるようになったが、記録から消え去った。しかし、彼らは無言の英雄として残った。彼らはオルド・ゼノスと強い同盟を結び、ロード・キャプテンはインキジションとの新たな協力の道を開いた。王座の代理人の支援により、損害を最小限に抑え、フレイアーズの襲撃を撃退することができた。そして、無名最後の連隊で勤務した者の中には、インキジションに招かれた者もいた。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayers, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 無名最後の連隊は、墓守兵として知られるようになったが、記録から消え去った。しかし、彼らは無言の英雄として残った。彼らはオルド・ゼノスと強い同盟を結び、ロード・キャプテンはインキジションとの新たな協力の道を開いた。王座の代理人の支援により、損害を最小限に抑え、フレイアーズの襲撃を撃退することができた。そして、無名最後の連隊で勤務した者の中には、インキジションに招かれた者もいた。

languages.text: 那支被称为“无名终旅营”的墓穴守卫部队虽然从所有官方记录中消失了，可他们依然是无名英雄。他们与异形审判庭结下牢固联盟，为舰长大人开辟了与审判庭合作的新途径。黄金王座的特工及时驰援，击退了剥皮者的猛攻，并将损失降到最低。后来，一些曾在这支部队服役的老兵也被招募进审判庭。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayed Ones, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 那支被称为“无名终旅营”的墓穴守卫部队虽然从所有官方记录中消失了，可他们依然是无名英雄。他们与异形审判庭结下牢固联盟，为舰长大人开辟了与审判庭合作的新途径。黄金王座的特工及时驰援，击退了剥皮者的猛攻，并将损失降到最低。后来，一些曾在这支部队服役的老兵也被招募进审判庭。

languages.text: Même si le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, sa réputation de troupe héroïque perdura. Il forgea une puissante alliance avec l'Ordo Xenos et facilita la collaboration {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} avec l'Inquisition, dont le soutien permit de minimiser les pertes et de repousser l'assaut des Dépeceurs. Certains des membres du bataillon furent ensuite recrutés par l'Inquisition.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayed Ones, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Même si le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, sa réputation de troupe héroïque perdura. Il forgea une puissante alliance avec l'Ordo Xenos et facilita la collaboration {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} avec l'Inquisition, dont le soutien permit de minimiser les pertes et de repousser l'assaut des Dépeceurs. Certains des membres du bataillon furent ensuite recrutés par l'Inquisition.

languages.text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, desapareció de todo registro, pero sus miembros fueron héroes a espaldas del mundo. Forjaron una alianza firme con el Ordo Xenos y proporcionaron a{mf|l | la} Lord Capitán una nueva forma de colaborar con la Inquisición. El apoyo de los agentes del Trono ayudó a minimizar sus pérdidas y a rechazar el asalto de los Desolladores, y algunos soldados de los Últimos Sin Nombre acabaron reclutados por la Inquisición.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayed Ones, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, desapareció de todo registro, pero sus miembros fueron héroes a espaldas del mundo. Forjaron una alianza firme con el Ordo Xenos y proporcionaron a{mf|l | la} Lord Capitán una nueva forma de colaborar con la Inquisición. El apoyo de los agentes del Trono ayudó a minimizar sus pérdidas y a rechazar el asalto de los Desolladores, y algunos soldados de los Últimos Sin Nombre acabaron reclutados por la Inquisición.

languages.text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu tüm kayıtlardan silinse de adları anılmayan kahramanlar olarak kaldılar. Zeno Nizamı ile güçlü bir ittifak kurdular ve Lord Kaptan'a Engizisyon ile yeni bir iş birliği imkânı sağladılar. Taht ajanlarının desteği, kayıpları en aza indirmeye ve Yüzülmüşler'in saldırısını püskürtmeye yardımcı oldu. İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu'nda hizmet etmiş olanlardan bazıları Engizisyon'da hizmet etmek üzere görevlendirildi.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes. They forged a strong alliance with the Ordo Xenos and provided the Lord Captain with a new vein of collaboration with the Inquisition. The support of the agents of the Throne helped minimise losses and repel the onslaught of the Flayed Ones, and some who had served in the Nameless Last were recruited to serve in the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu tüm kayıtlardan silinse de adları anılmayan kahramanlar olarak kaldılar. Taht ajanlarının desteği, kayıpları en aza indirmeye ve Yüzülmüşler'in saldırısını püskürtmeye yardımcı oldu. İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu'nda hizmet etmiş olanlardan bazıları Engizisyon'da hizmet etmek üzere görevlendirildi.

languages.text: Das Bataillon der Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wachen der Gruft genannt wurden, verschwand aus allen Aufzeichnungen, aber seine Soldaten galten weiterhin als Helden. Sie bildeten eine starke Allianz mit dem Ordo Xenos und boten dem Lord Captain eine neue Art der Zusammenarbeit mit der Inquisition. Durch die Unterstützung der Agenten des Throns konnten die Verluste minimiert und der Angriff der Albträume zurückgeschlagen werden. Überdies dienten einige Soldaten der Namenlosen Letzten fortan der Inquisition.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but remained unspoken heroes.
